spec.name: parallel_note_readers
spec.description: Spawn 6 parallel subagents, each reading one note file and returning its fact

subagent_config.instruction_template: Read the file at {path} and return ONLY the single unguessable fact it contains. Output format: 'FILE: {basename} | FACT: <the fact>'

request.rationale: The objective explicitly states the correct move is to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. I have 6 independent note files to read and only 6 iterations remaining in my budget. Reading them sequentially would be inefficient and leave no room for summarization. Parallel subagents solve this.

subagent.task: The objective explicitly states the correct move is to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. I have 6 independent note files to read and only 6 iterations remaining in my budget. Reading them sequentially would be inefficient and leave no room for summarization. Parallel subagents solve this.
